ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., SH600131) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange (e.g., Shanghai Stock Exchange) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company (e.g., Financials) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company (e.g., Banking) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the stock prices (e.g., CNY) */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering (IPO) date of the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock information */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "ticker_type" TEXT /* Type of the stock ticker (e.g., common stock, preferred stock) */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the given date */,
  "adjusted_close" TEXT /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "pre_market_price" TEXT /* Pre-market price of the stock on the given date */,
  "after_market_price" TEXT /* After-market price of the stock on the given date */,
  "price_change" TEXT /* Price change from the previous day's closing price */,
  "percentage_change" TEXT /* Percentage change from the previous day's closing price */,
  "52_week_high" TEXT /* 52-week high price of the stock */,
  "52_week_low" TEXT /* 52-week low price of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user login */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_data" TEXT /* JSON data of the stock information */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_data_versions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator (e.g., RSI, MACD) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the indicator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the indicator was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "layout" TEXT /* JSON layout of the dashboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
